note: Axes are created/destroyed implicitly by chartType changes, not via Add/Remove on axis directly. Extended charts (funnel/treemap/sunburst/boxWhisker/histogram) reject axis path — use chart-level Set. Add-time configuration: use the chart element's axis* props (axismin, axismax, axistitle, axisfont, ...) when creating the chart; chart-axis covers post-creation Set/Get. `labelFont`, `lineWidth`, `lineDash` are not yet supported on axis-by-role paths. `lineWidth`/`lineDash` Set on a chart-axis path currently apply to all series in the plot area; `labelFont` writes the axis title run, not tick labels. Use chart-series schema for series line styling.

title.description: axis title text. Applies to all roles (category, value). Pass 'none' to remove.

visible.description: show or hide the axis. Applies to all roles.

min.description: minimum scale of the value axis. Only valid for role=value or role=value2; ignored on category axes.

max.description: maximum scale of the value axis. Only valid for role=value or role=value2; ignored on category axes.

logBase.description: logarithmic base for value axis scale. Only valid for role=value or role=value2; ignored on category axes.

majorGridlines.description: show or hide major gridlines. Applies to all roles.

minorGridlines.description: show or hide minor gridlines. Applies to all roles.

majorUnit.description: major tick interval on the value axis. Applies to role=value|value2.

minorUnit.description: minor tick interval on the value axis. Applies to role=value|value2.

dispUnits.description: display units for value axis labels. Applies to role=value|value2.

axisMin.description: value-axis minimum readback (also surfaced via min on axis-by-role path).

axisMax.description: value-axis maximum readback (also surfaced via max on axis-by-role path).

axisTitle.description: value-axis title readback (chart-level convenience; axis-by-role uses 'title').

axisOrientation.description: axis scaling orientation (e.g. maxMin when reversed).
